question: Which statement best describes the main difficulty in interpreting this annual revenue chart from 1924 to 2024?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is hard to clearly see detailed changes and exact values over time.
options.B: Annual revenue decreased sharply from 1970 to 1980.
options.C: Annual revenue remained constant throughout the entire period.
options.D: There are large seasonal spikes every few years.

explanation: The chart shows a steady increase throughout. Small size can lead to misreading a segment as a decline.
